channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Analyzed Solar Panel ROI Across All 50 US States Using Government Data — Here's What Surprised Me
item.description: Solar panel ROI varies wildly across the United States — but not for the reasons most people think. I built a free calculator using data from the NREL PVWatts API and EIA electricity rates to...

item.title: Es HOY! Lanzamiento de Artemis II - 1 de abril de 2026 🚀
item.description: Sí!, me encantan los viajes espaciales, me encanta la física, de niña (y aún) quise ser astronauta, me encanta el universo, las estrellas y la luna, por ello hoy quiero salirme del contenido...

item.title: Building multilingual runtime collections in a Filament plugin
item.description: Building multilingual runtime collections in a Filament plugin I just released v1.2.0 of Filament Studio, a Filament v5 plugin I am building for runtime collections, custom fields, dashboards,...

item.title: OpenAI's Promptfoo deal puts evaluation and red-teaming at the centre of the agent stack
item.description: The acquisition signals that agent quality is no longer judged only by fluency - it is judged by whether organisations can test, document, and govern failure before deployment. AI Security 路 March...

item.title: Opencode for network systems administration. OMG.
item.description: I've been running a homelab for a few years now. Nothing fancy - a Proxmox box, couple Docker hosts, a router running OpenWrt, and a VPS for public-facing stuff. The usual. The problem was...

item.title: How to Detect if a Website Uses Intercom: 5 Methods
item.description: Intercom is one of the most popular customer messaging platforms on the web. Companies use it for live chat, in-app messaging, help centers, and product tours—making it a key indicator of how a...

item.title: I built Arden to optimize one thing: feedback loop speed
item.description: Most language posts sell syntax. I care more about this: edit code -> get signal fast. Arden is a native systems language built around that loop: native output via LLVM strict static checks...

item.title: Engineering the Nexus Release: How I Built Secure E2EE Network Sync into a Linux Clipboard Manager (v1.5.1)
item.description: A deep dive into the architecture behind DotGhostBoard v1.5.0 — zero-config mDNS discovery, X25519 ECDH pairing, AES-256-GCM sync, rate limiting, and PyQt6 threading — all without a central...

item.title: Leetcode # 107. Binary Tree Level Order Traversal II
item.description: Problem Given the root of a binary tree, return the bottom-up level order traversal of its nodes' values. (i.e., from left to right, level by level from leaf to root). Example 1: Input: root =...

item.title: Why Deepfake Allegations Are Hard to Assess From Redistributed Video
item.description: When a suspicious video is already all over social media, the hardest part is not running detectors. The hardest part is figuring out what the file can still tell you after platform recompression,...

item.title: Ford’s EV and software chief Doug Field is leaving the company
item.description: Doug Field, who left Apple five years ago to helm Ford's multibillion-dollar bet on electric vehicles and software, is stepping down next month. Replacing him will be Alan Clarke, the ex-Tesla...

item.title: Trump’s posting even more AI-generated Trump-Jesus fan art
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about Big Tech power plays in Washington and beyond. (And when I say beyond, I mean the great beyond, like Heaven, maybe.) If...

item.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
item.description: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

item.title: Ticketmaster is an illegal monopoly, jury finds
item.description: Live Nation-Ticketmaster is an illegal monopolist, a Manhattan jury found, according to Bloomberg. The jury found the company liable on three counts: illegally monopolizing the market for live...

item.title: FTC pushes ad agencies into dropping brand safety rules
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) and a group of eight states have announced a proposed settlement with big ad agencies that will prevent them from working together to avoid certain platforms...

item.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
item.description: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

item.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
item.description: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

item.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
item.description: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

item.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
item.description: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

item.title: Ikea’s smart donut lamp is a sweet treat
item.description: Ikea's popular Varmblixt lamp just got a smart home glow-up. The delightfully bulbous light now features color-changing, dimming, and smart home control. I tested the new smart lamp in my...

item.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
item.description: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.

item.title: Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac
item.description: Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. With the app, you can use the Option + Space shortcut to...

item.title: Microsoft counters the MacBook Neo with freebies for students
item.description: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo ($499 for students) has sent shockwaves through the PC ecosystem, and now Microsoft is responding with deals targeting students in the US. A new "Microsoft College Offer"...

item.title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
item.description: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

item.title: The musician-turned-biotech-founder waiting to fundraise
item.description: When Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter Aloe Blacc got COVID despite being vaccinated and boosted, he tried to fund research for a better solution. What he quickly found out? You can’t just write...

item.title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
item.description: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

item.title: n8n Webhooks Abused Since October 2025 to Deliver Malware via Phishing Emails
item.description: Threat actors have been observed weaponizing n8n, a popular artificial intelligence (AI) workflow automation platform, to facilitate sophisticated phishing campaigns and deliver malicious payloads...

item.title: Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale features deals on dozens of our favorite gadgets
item.description: If you missed out on Amazon’s recent spring sales event, Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale presents yet another opportunity to score steep discounts on some of our favorite gadgets. The five-day...

item.title: The Senate is voting to save free IRS Direct File today
item.description: The Senate is getting ready to vote on a bill to resurrect IRS Direct File, the free tax filing service axed by the Trump administration in 2025. On Wednesday, Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) will...

item.title: Most people still don’t want anything to do with robotaxis
item.description: I've been reporting on self-driving cars for over a decade, and I've seen the technology go through many ups and downs, highs and lows. But one thing has remained remarkably the same over the...
